python-for-beginners.title: Python for Beginners
python-for-beginners.description: A practical beginner Python course from first program through functions, files, classes, testing, and a capstone project.
python-for-beginners.moreComingSoon: More Python for Beginners lessons are coming soon.

python-8.title: Object-Oriented Programming
python-8.description: Introduce classes and objects as a way to model related state and behavior.
why: Prepares learners for the next skills in the course.

python-for-beginners-python-8-core-build.title: Class Basics
python-for-beginners-python-8-core-build.description: Learn classes and instances, attributes and __init__, methods and self through focused examples and practice.

python-for-beginners-python-8-core-build.title: Design With Objects
python-for-beginners-python-8-core-build.description: Learn encapsulation and responsibility, lists of objects, class debugging patterns through focused examples and practice.
